title: Decision-point carry inspect result
description: Exact ignored-local carry ownership, lifecycle, and safe recovery projection.

status.description: Whether carry storage and records are present.

selected_key.description: Currently selected exact carry key, or an empty string.

active_count.description: Carry records whose lifecycle is active.

records.description: Exact carry records with ownership and lifecycle facts.

selection.description: Current supported selection receipt, when present.

select.description: Command template for selecting one carry.

prune.description: Command template for pruning a positively stale selected carry.

rule.description: Safety rule governing exact carry recovery.
